title: Yu with breve
summary: Yu with breve (Ю̆ ю̆; italics: Ю̆ ю̆) is a letter of the Cyrillic script. Yu with breve is used in the Kazym and Shuryshkar dialects of the Northern Khanty language.
text: Yu with breve (Ю̆ ю̆; italics: Ю̆ ю̆) is a letter of the Cyrillic script. Yu with breve is used in the Kazym and Shuryshkar dialects of the Northern Khanty language.
